questionHtml: Determine the initial rate of reaction in experiment 4.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1:

«k = » 1.25 «mol–1 dm3 s–1» ✔

 

«rate = 1.25 mol–1 dm3 s–1 × 0.60 mol dm–3 × 0.25 mol dm–3»

1.9 x 10–1 «mol dm–3 s–1» ✔

 

ALTERNATIVE 2:

«[NaOH] exp. 4 is 3 × exp. 1»

«[C5H11Cl] exp. 4 is 2.5 × exp. 1»

«exp. 4 will be » 7.5× faster ✔

1.9 x 10–1 «mol dm–3 s–1» ✔

 

Award [2] for correct final answer.

meta.title: Determine the initial rate of reaction in experiment 4.
